2ef432e1-83c1-4fc1-b38e-bf1537596c71.label: text_chunk
2ef432e1-83c1-4fc1-b38e-bf1537596c71.text:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement  (“Agreement”) is entered into by and between PromonLogicalis Tecnologia e Participações Ltda. and PTLS Serviços de Tecnologia e Assessoria Técnica Ltda., both with main office at Av.

8a0a4e8c-87a8-4172-bd0b-e43a43351edf.label: text_chunk
8a0a4e8c-87a8-4172-bd0b-e43a43351edf.text: Presidente Juscelino Kubitschek, 1830, 1º andar, Torre I and II, São Paulo, SP, Brasil, (“hereinafter referred to “ PromonLogicalis ”), and the Company . PromonLogicalis and the Company are individually referred to herein as the “ Party ”, “ Disclosing Part y” or “ Receiving Party ”, as appropriate, or collectively as the “ Parties ”.

e2a45945-d1aa-4755-b53d-a45ade121d04.label: text_chunk
e2a45945-d1aa-4755-b53d-a45ade121d04.text:
The Parties agree this Agreement shall be deemed valid and legal from the moment the authorized representative of the Company click "Sign Non-Disclosure Agreement" at PromonLogicalis’ website where is located the form for creation and acceptance of this Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Execution Date").The  Parties  have  entered  into  this  Non-Disclosure  Agreement,  which  is  governed  by  the  following  terms  and conditions:

1.

8338a242-83f7-4a44-be2f-f10d354c64fe.label: text_chunk
8338a242-83f7-4a44-be2f-f10d354c64fe.text:
This agreement’s purpose is to ensure secrecy and confidentiality of the information to be provided,

 from the Execution Date, by one Party (" Disclosing Party ") and its Affiliates to the other (" Receiving Party ") during any evaluation, negotiations or commercial relationship, that may be engaged between them (“Scope”).

e9c43a04-d8af-4eff-8544-0469fbc1872f.label: text_chunk
e9c43a04-d8af-4eff-8544-0469fbc1872f.text:
For the purpose of this Agreement, Affiliates means with respect to a party, any corporation or entity which (i) controls either directly or indirectly that party, or (ii) is controlled directly or indirectly by that party, or (iii) is under common control with the party.

2.

0fd013c7-44ae-4c46-81f0-c8873c493a87.label: text_chunk
0fd013c7-44ae-4c46-81f0-c8873c493a87.text:
All the information that (i) is written and marked as CONFIDENTIAL,

 or (ii) is disclosed verbally, and at the time of its disclosure, the Disclosing Party's identify such information to be protected in accordance with this Agreement  ( "Confidential  Information" ),  shall  be  considered  confidential  and  restricted  property  of  the Disclosing Party .

3.

 The  term  "Information"  shall  include  all  written  information,

29854be9-8f3f-4614-89cc-e3ca068e4160.label: text_chunk
29854be9-8f3f-4614-89cc-e3ca068e4160.text:
verbal  or  otherwise  presented  in  tangible  or intangible way, including, but not limited to, trade secrets, discoveries, ideas, concepts, know-how, techniques, technology,  products,  designs,  specifications,  drawings,  diagrams,  data,  computer  programs,  business activities and operations, reports, studies and other technical, commercial, financial information of each Party or its Affiliates.

4.

647bfa6b-ccb2-4656-998b-08c4bb7797b8.label: text_chunk
647bfa6b-ccb2-4656-998b-08c4bb7797b8.text:
The  Receiving  Party  undertakes,

  for  the  period  of  time  specified  in  Section  13,  to  keep  confidential  all Confidential  Information submitted  by  the Disclosing Party ,  either  directly  or  indirectly  through subcontractors  and  other  partners  of  the Disclosing  Party ,  and  being  subject  to  the  rules  of  intellectual property.

1a61ec6a-8d66-41c5-a584-796490e1f208.label: text_chunk
1a61ec6a-8d66-41c5-a584-796490e1f208.text:
4.1 The Receiving Party for purposes of confidentiality is bound by its managers, employees,

 agents, for any purpose, and principals.

4.

2 The Receiving Party acknowledges that the technical specifications as well as all documents to be disclosed are not subject to appropriation, remain the property of Disclosing Party or any third party, as applicable.

4.

3 Each  Party  agrees  to  use Confidential  Information only  for  the  purposes  of  this Agreement.

6c2ca866-97b3-4011-ac25-303fd8b9d4d6.label: text_chunk
6c2ca866-97b3-4011-ac25-303fd8b9d4d6.text:
No license or right under any intellectual property right is granted by the mere transmittal of Confidential Information to the Receiving Party , nor shall such a transmission constitute any representation or warranty by the Disclosing Party with respect to infringement of intellectual property rights of third parties.

5.

 The Receiving Party agrees for the period specified in Section 13  that it will:

a.

 Restrict disclosure of the Confidential Information to the minimum required number of people (such as  employees,  directors,

c28adbdf-af84-450e-955d-cb5dc42f998b.label: text_chunk
c28adbdf-af84-450e-955d-cb5dc42f998b.text:
officers,  legal  counsels,  accountants  or  consultants  who  shall  also  be personally bound to maintain the Information in confidence); b. Direct its employees, agents and subcontractors to abide by non-disclosure terms at least as protective of the Confidential Information as those set forth herein; c.

 Maintain  the  confidentiality  and  take  proper  measures  to  protect  the  secrecy  of  the Confidential Information ,

446d1acb-9961-4ed4-8926-d6a360606352.label: text_chunk
446d1acb-9961-4ed4-8926-d6a360606352.text:
using the same degree of care that it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in any event shall use at least commercially reasonable care .;

d. Immediately notify the other party of any misappropriation or misuse of Confidential Information .

6. The breach of the terms set forth herein imply:

1 de 2 PromonLogicalis Non-Disclosure Agreement (version August 2015)

a.

9f5de511-39c7-4f86-a77e-ec933f6234aa.label: text_chunk
9f5de511-39c7-4f86-a77e-ec933f6234aa.text:
Termination  of  any  agreement  executed  by  and  between  the  Parties,  without  any  obligation  to compensation for the complainant, being due, however, the penalties for breach of contract by the party which gives cause to termination;

b. Payment of damages as set forth in Section 9 and the applicable law.

7. Confidential Information shall not include information which is:

a.

f110f1fb-4ee7-4b00-a971-fccfc2a67939.label: text_chunk
f110f1fb-4ee7-4b00-a971-fccfc2a67939.text:
The  information  was  already  known  by  the Receiving  Party prior  to  its  disclosure  by  a  legal  and

legitimate way, not subject to any obligation to be kept confidential; b.

 There has been prior written consent of Disclosing Party , to release the obligation of secrecy and confidentiality;

c.

 Lawfully obtained by the Receiving Party from a third party without restrictions as to use and disclose; d.

bf65308b-e62b-4b40-b683-8abfeadef9cc.label: text_chunk
bf65308b-e62b-4b40-b683-8abfeadef9cc.text: If  the Receiving  Party receives  a  court  order  to  disclose Confidential  Information .

9211f632-5353-4627-988a-eeb3e4b6622e.label: text_chunk

dd0d7432-e99e-4eb3-93d2-cdf7c3201274.label: text_chunk
dd0d7432-e99e-4eb3-93d2-cdf7c3201274.text:
8.

 All information (either Confidential Information or not) furnished under this Agreement shall remain the property of  the Disclosing  Party and  shall  be  returned  to  it  or  destroyed  promptly  at  its  request  (together  with  all relevant copies, extracts, plans, schematics or other reproductions). ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED “AS IS.

75b9316d-6cea-4dd1-88ed-e0f9b5b6cf12.label: text_chunk
75b9316d-6cea-4dd1-88ed-e0f9b5b6cf12.text:
”  NEITHER PARTY MAKES ANY WARRANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE, REGARDING  THE  ACCURACY,  COMPLETENESS  OR  PERFORMANCE  OF  THE  CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION, AND EACH PARTY EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ANY WARRANTY OF MERCHANTABILITY, NON-INFRINGEMENT OR FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

9.

 The Parties acknowledge that the breach of secrecy has the character of serious irregularity and can cause serious damages to the other Party.

393bd2dc-d69e-4428-8222-fe675c6bcc40.label: text_chunk
393bd2dc-d69e-4428-8222-fe675c6bcc40.text:
9.1 In case of breach of any obligation set forth herein by the Receiving Party ,

 the Disclosing Party shall recover any and all damages. Notwithstanding any other provision herein, neither Party shall be liable for indirect damages or loss of profits.

28705d92-aaab-4d40-8118-f3cd4cffe7f2.label: text_chunk
28705d92-aaab-4d40-8118-f3cd4cffe7f2.text:
9.2 Accordingly,

 the actual or threatened unauthorized disclosure or use of any Information shall give the Disclosing Party the right to seek injunctive relief restraining such unauthorized disclosure or use, without the necessity of proving actual damages, in addition to any other remedy otherwise available to the Disclosing Party .  Any third party owner of Information disclosed by a party hereto shall be an intended third party beneficiary of this Agreement and shall be entitled to rely upon and directly enforce the terms and conditions hereof.

89291a7a-c13a-45a7-a8e5-b1efee7e9f9e.label: text_chunk
89291a7a-c13a-45a7-a8e5-b1efee7e9f9e.text:
10.

  Neither the execution of this Agreement nor the furnishing of any information under this Agreement shall be construed as granting any Party or any of its representatives, either expressly or by implication, any license or right to use any Confidential Information for its own benefit or the benefit of any other person, firm or entity,  and  each  party  expressly  agrees  not  to  so  use  any  such  information.

0f0e67b2-a472-412a-899a-ec80d2b9b8f6.label: text_chunk
0f0e67b2-a472-412a-899a-ec80d2b9b8f6.text:
Nothing  contained  in  this Agreement shall be construed as conferring any rights, by license or otherwise, to any invention, discovery, or improvement made, conceived or acquired prior to, during or after the date of this Agreement.

11.

  The disclosure of confidential information is not a commitment by Disclosing Party to enter into any business arrangement with the Receiving Party or third parties. If the Parties wish to pursue business opportunities, they shall execute a separate written agreement to govern such relationship.

f2a5c837-51d1-49f0-aa36-040def8e6d4d.label: text_chunk
f2a5c837-51d1-49f0-aa36-040def8e6d4d.text:
12.

  Failure to enforce any provision of this Agreement shall not constitute a waiver of any term.

13.

  This Agreement shall be in force on the Execution Date and shall remain in force for a period of twenty-four (24) months. Notwithstanding the term of the Agreement , the Parties undertake to maintain the confidentiality obligation for a period of three (3) years after Confidential Information disclosure.

14.  This Agreement binds not only the parties, but also their successors and assignees.

408f9c5a-f8ce-4528-b53c-32454cf3f82a.label: text_chunk
408f9c5a-f8ce-4528-b53c-32454cf3f82a.text:
15.  Governing law and Venue:

(i) If you the Company is located in Latin America countries:

 This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Brazil. The Parties elect the courts sitting in the Forum of the city of São Paulo, SP, Brazil, as the exclusive jurisdiction and venue over any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement .

00c3048f-0970-4594-9b05-bc30fad73ca0.label: text_chunk
00c3048f-0970-4594-9b05-bc30fad73ca0.text:
2 de 2 PromonLogicalis Non-Disclosure Agreement (version August 2015)

(ii) If you the Company is not located in Latin America countries:

 This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of New York, without reference to its conflicts of law provisions.

3f5ae0b3-e51f-4cf5-b51c-34b407f029a9.label: text_chunk
3f5ae0b3-e51f-4cf5-b51c-34b407f029a9.text:
Any dispute regarding this Agreement will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction  of  the  state  courts  in  and  for  New  York,  U.S.A.  and  the  parties  hereby  irrevocably agree to submit to the personal and exclusive jurisdiction and venue of such courts.

16. In case of any lawsuit, the Parties undertake to request judicial secrecy.

community_summary.0: The relationship between PromonLogicalis Tecnologia e Participações Ltda. and PTLS Serviços de Tecnologia e Assessoria Técnica Ltda. is characterized by a formal Contractual Agreement, specifically a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA). This NDA signifies a commitment from both entities to safeguard confidential information exchanged between them, highlighting the importance of trust and confidentiality in their professional interactions.
community_summary.1: The relationships highlight Juscelino Kubitschek as a significant figure in Brazilian history, particularly during his presidency. The mention of PromonLogicalis indicates a connection to the economic and historical context of Brazil during this period. This suggests that PromonLogicalis may play a role in understanding the developments and transformations that occurred in Brazil under Kubitschek's leadership, emphasizing the interplay between historical figures and economic entities in shaping the nation's trajectory.
community_summary.2:
In this summary, we have the following entities and their relationships:

1. **Company** and **PromonLogicalis**: The Company is represented by PromonLogicalis, which facilitates the signing of the Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA). This indicates that PromonLogicalis plays a crucial role in managing the NDA process for the Company.

2. **Hosts** and **Company**: Similar to the previous relationship, Hosts also represent the Company through PromonLogicalis, emphasizing the platform's importance in the NDA signing process.

Overall, the key aspect of these relationships is the reliance of the Company on PromonLogicalis for the execution of NDAs, highlighting PromonLogicalis's role as a critical intermediary in this legal process.
community_summary.3:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party shares and transmits confidential information to the Receiving Party as part of a formal agreement. This relationship is governed by confidentiality obligations, ensuring that the Receiving Party handles the information according to specified terms.

2. **Disclosing Party and Affiliates**: The Disclosing Party is associated with its Affiliates, who may also participate in the sharing of confidential information under the same agreement.

3. **Disclosing Party and Information**: The Disclosing Party is responsible for disclosing information, which may be at risk of unauthorized disclosure. This highlights the importance of the confidentiality measures in place.

4. **Disclosing Party's Rights**: In the event of a breach of obligations by the Receiving Party, the Disclosing Party has the right to recover damages, emphasizing the legal protections afforded to the Disclosing Party in the agreement.

Overall, these relationships underscore the critical nature of confidentiality in the exchange of sensitive information and the legal frameworks that protect the interests of the Disclosing Party.
community_summary.4: The relationship between "Affiliates" and "party" is characterized by the definition of "Affiliates" within the context of an Agreement. This term describes a relationship of control among the parties involved, indicating that "Affiliates" refers to entities that have a controlling influence over one another in a legal or organizational framework. The definition emphasizes the significance of the term in understanding the dynamics of control and association among the parties in the Agreement.

community_summary.6:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Receiving Party and Disclosing Party**: The Receiving Party is bound by a Confidentiality Agreement to keep the Confidential Information provided by the Disclosing Party confidential. This obligation includes adhering to the terms of the agreement regarding the handling and disclosure of such information.

2. **Confidential Information Transfer**: The Receiving Party receives confidential information from the Disclosing Party, which retains ownership of this information. The Receiving Party is obligated to protect this information and is bound by confidentiality obligations.

3. **Legal and Notification Obligations**: The Receiving Party must comply with applicable laws when handling the confidential information and is required to notify the Disclosing Party promptly to prevent unauthorized disclosures. Additionally, the Receiving Party is obligated to comply with any Court Orders that may require disclosure of the Confidential Information.

4. **Consent and Release of Obligations**: The relationship between the Receiving Party and the Disclosing Party is also governed by prior written consent, which may allow the Receiving Party to release certain obligations of secrecy and confidentiality.

Overall, the relationships emphasize the Receiving Party's responsibilities to maintain confidentiality, comply with legal requirements, and communicate effectively with the Disclosing Party to safeguard sensitive information.
